MyKHAS

The inspired meet the inspired.

KHAS Star Women Mentorship Program, which brings together successful female students of Kadir Has University with inspiring female professionals who stand out in their fields, is a special development program that aims to further strengthen the potential of young women.

Our students, each of whom are the first in their departments, will meet with experience, vision and inspiration and will guide their career journey with valuable guidance.

Thanks to one-to-one meetings with experts in their fields, not only information transfer but also encouragement, motivation and real-world experience sharing will be at the center of this process.

This unique mentoring experience will be one of the steps that will carry the strong women of our university into the future.
